mapper.select: SELECT * FROM training_plans WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM training_plans WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM training_plans WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE training_plans SET plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status}, ai_suggestions = #{aiSuggestions}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_plans WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM users WHERE role = 'STUDENT' AND status = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT u.* FROM users u INNER JOIN coach_student_relations csr ON u.id = csr.coach_id WHERE csr.student_id = #{studentId} AND csr.status = 1 ORDER BY csr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
